strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles directly matches the required stack
Founded and operates GISCollective, a Kubernetes-deployable platform integrating multiple data sources — mirrors the platform-integration responsibilities
Contributes to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, aligning strongly with the LLM/API nice-to-haves
concerns: Resume emphasizes Staff/Senior roles, while the posting targets entry/junior level
PostgreSQL is not explicitly listed (MongoDB and MySQL are) though relational DB familiarity is evident
German is only basic, which may matter for a high on-site role in a German-speaking consulting context
response.justification: The candidate brings exactly the fullstack TypeScript, React, and Node.js foundation the role requires, demonstrated across multiple Berlin-based product teams including Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq. Their founding and ongoing stewardship of GISCollective — a Kubernetes-deployable, event-driven platform integrating diverse data sources — directly mirrors the platform/portal integration work described, while their current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq covers the LLM nice-to-haves with room to spare. Strong testing discipline (TDD, workshops, Fluent-Asserts) and a clear interest in clean architecture make them a high-upside hire who can contribute immediately and grow into broader ownership.
